# Phase 2: Migration Execution

*This document is generated by the db-migration agent during Phase 2.*

## Status: Pending

Run Phase 1 first, then Phase 2 will execute the migration.

## Expected Contents

- pgLoader dry-run results (type mapping validation)
- pgLoader data transfer summary
- SP translation status (Copilot + ora2pg consensus)
- Incompatible pattern rewrites (cursors, MERGE, etc.)
- sqlfluff lint results
- pgtap test results
- Migration flow Mermaid diagram
